summary: Soundboard recording captures a classic Help‑Slip‑Fire sequence from the Boston Fall ’91 run.
review: The show is praised for its classic Help > Slip > Fire on the Mountain segment, with the reviewer noting it stands out even when compared to the preceding nine‑night MSG stretch. The source appears to be a soundboard tape and no audio flaws are mentioned, implying solid clarity.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights a standout song sequence and gives no recording complaints; weighting favors the strong musical moment while assuming decent soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio issues reported; presumed clear soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes familiarity with the preceding MSG run and calls the Boston set classic, suggesting a well‑structured and engaging performance.
